description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM CI that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a concurrency strategy to cancel previous runs if a new commit is pushed. The workflow should have three jobs: build-posix on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest, build-windows on windows-2019, and build-bazel on ubuntu-latest. Each job should check out the repository and submodules, get CPU info, and then build and test FBGEMM libraries in various configurations.
